title: Support food safety and quality programs
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Support food safety and quality programs demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Monitor food safety and quality in work area

pcs.text: Identify regulatory basis for compliance with the workplace food safety and quality program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify regulatory basis for compliance with the workplace food safety and quality program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify regulatory basis for compliance with the workplace food safety and quality program.

pcs.text: Confirm that standard operating procedures (SOPs) for controlling food safety hazards and risks are communicated to others in the work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that standard operating procedures (SOPs) for controlling food safety hazards and risks are communicated to others in the work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that standard operating procedures (SOPs) for controlling food safety hazards and risks are communicated to others in the work area.

pcs.text: Confirm process of monitoring critical control points (CCPs) to control hazards and risks is communicated to others in the work area
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm process of monitoring critical control points (CCPs) to control hazards and risks is communicated to others in the work area?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm process of monitoring critical control points (CCPs) to control hazards and risks is communicated to others in the work area.

pcs.text: Review work instructions and SOPs for accuracy
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review work instructions and SOPs for accuracy?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review work instructions and SOPs for accuracy.

pcs.text: Monitor implementation of work instructions and operating procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor implementation of work instructions and operating procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor implementation of work instructions and operating procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Monitor food safety and quality in work area

elements.title: Monitor CCP records

pcs.text: Identify the CCPs in the HACCP program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify the CCPs in the HACCP program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify the CCPs in the HACCP program.

pcs.text: Identify and implement appropriate procedures for monitoring CCPs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and implement appropriate procedures for monitoring CCPs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and implement appropriate procedures for monitoring CCPs.

pcs.text: Identify critical limits and causes for product or process not conforming
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify critical limits and causes for product or process not conforming?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify critical limits and causes for product or process not conforming.

pcs.text: Monitor CCP monitoring records to verify product quality and identify performance trends
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor CCP monitoring records to verify product quality and identify performance trends?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor CCP monitoring records to verify product quality and identify performance trends.

pcs.text: Identify and report opportunities for improvements to procedures to reduce non-compliance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report opportunities for improvements to procedures to reduce non-compliance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report opportunities for improvements to procedures to reduce non-compliance.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Monitor CCP records

elements.title: Identify non-conforming product or processes

pcs.text: Identify processes or conditions that could result in a breach of meat safety procedures and require corrective actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify processes or conditions that could result in a breach of meat safety procedures and require corrective actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify processes or conditions that could result in a breach of meat safety procedures and require corrective actions.

pcs.text: Identify procedures for taking corrective actions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify procedures for taking corrective actions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify procedures for taking corrective actions.

pcs.text: Monitor implementation of corrective and preventative measures to prevent recurrence
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor implementation of corrective and preventative measures to prevent recurrence?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor implementation of corrective and preventative measures to prevent recurrence.

pcs.text: Identify process to update and distribute amended SOP
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify process to update and distribute amended SOP?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify process to update and distribute amended SOP.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Identify non-conforming product or processes

elements.title: Review product samples and test results

pcs.text: Identify product sampling procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify product sampling procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify product sampling procedures.

pcs.text: Identify post-collection procedures according to SOPs
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify post-collection procedures according to SOPs?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify post-collection procedures according to SOPs.

pcs.text: Review and respond to test results according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and respond to test results according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and respond to test results according to workplace requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Review product samples and test results

elements.title: Calculate yield, wastage and productivity indicators

pcs.text: Calculate yield, wastage and productivity measures to determine performance outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate yield, wastage and productivity measures to determine performance outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate yield, wastage and productivity measures to determine performance outcomes.

pcs.text: Compare yield, wastage and productivity measures with targets to determine variations between actual and planned performance
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compare yield, wastage and productivity measures with targets to determine variations between actual and planned performance?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compare yield, wastage and productivity measures with targets to determine variations between actual and planned performance.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Calculate yield, wastage and productivity indicators

elements.title: Calibrate food safety measuring instrument

pcs.text: Identify measuring instrument used to monitor food safety hazards and controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify measuring instrument used to monitor food safety hazards and controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify measuring instrument used to monitor food safety hazards and controls.

pcs.text: Calibrate measuring instrument according to regulatory and workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calibrate measuring instrument according to regulatory and workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calibrate measuring instrument according to regulatory and workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Determine required adjustments to ensure accuracy, and adjust instrument or identify instrument with relevant calibration adjustment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine required adjustments to ensure accuracy, and adjust instrument or identify instrument with relevant calibration adjustment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine required adjustments to ensure accuracy, and adjust instrument or identify instrument with relevant calibration adjustment.

pcs.text: Maintain a register of instrument calibrations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain a register of instrument calibrations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain a register of instrument calibrations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Calibrate food safety measuring instrument
